languages.original_text: "The sigil indicates that this acolyte served in the Ordo Hereticus. What were they doing here?"

languages.text: "Сигил говорит о том, что этот аколит служил в Ордо Еретикус. Что они тут делали?"
languages.translation_comment: Inquisitorial items found in the Trazin Museum

languages.text: 「この紋章は、この奉仕者が粛清の団に仕えていたことを示しています。彼らはここで何をしていましたか？」
languages.original_text: "The sigil indicates that this acolyte served in the Ordo Hereticus. What were they doing here?"

traits.locale_text: 「この紋章は、この奉仕者が Ordo Hereticus に仕えていたことを示しています。彼らはここで何をしていましたか？」

languages.text: « À en juger par le sceau, cet acolyte était membre de l'Ordo Hereticus. Que faisait-il ici ? »
languages.original_text: "The sigil indicates that this acolyte served in the Ordo Hereticus. What were they doing here?"

traits.locale_text: « À en juger par le sceau, cet acolyte était membre de l'Ordo Hereticus. Que faisait-il ici ? »

languages.text: "Dem Siegel zufolge diente dieser Akolyth dem Ordo Haereticus. Was wollte er hier?"
languages.original_text: "The sigil indicates that this acolyte served in the Ordo Hereticus. What were they doing here?"

traits.locale_text: "Dem Siegel zufolge diente dieser Akolyth dem Ordo Haereticus. Was wollte er hier?"

languages.text: "Mühür, bu havarinin Kâfir Nizamı'na hizmet ettiğini gösteriyor. Burada ne yapıyorlarmış?"
languages.original_text: "The sigil indicates that this acolyte served in the Ordo Hereticus. What were they doing here?"

traits.locale_text: "Mühür, bu havarinin Kâfir Nizamı'na hizmet ettiğini gösteriyor. Burada ne yapıyorlarmış?"

languages.text: «El sello de este acólito indica que servía al Ordo Haereticus. ¿Qué estarían haciendo aquí?».
languages.original_text: "The sigil indicates that this acolyte served in the Ordo Hereticus. What were they doing here?"

traits.locale_text: «El sello de este acólito indica que servía al Ordo Haereticus. ¿Qué estarían haciendo aquí?».

languages.text: “从这个印记来看，此名侍仆曾在异端审判庭效力。他们为何会出现在这里？”
languages.original_text: "The sigil indicates that this acolyte served in the Ordo Hereticus. What were they doing here?"

traits.locale_text: “从这个印记来看，此名侍仆曾在异端审判庭效力。他们为何会出现在这里？”
